sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 28

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 28:1
items.html: (to the question) For so it applies in all the degrees: they cannot receive except from their upper one adjacent to them, and not from a degree preceding the upper one. For like the beginning of emanation, so the order of the reception of the abundance one from another is a discernment of cause and effect in the order of the unfolding of the degrees, and none precedes its fellow by so much as a hair's breadth. (p. 755, Item 33)
